_README: Goes at glyde/.claude/settings.json — COMMIT IT. It travels to cloud sessions too.
defaultMode 'auto' is deliberately NOT here: Claude Code ignores 'auto' in project
settings so a repository cannot grant itself auto mode. It lives in ~/.claude/settings.json.
deny  = hard block, applies in EVERY permission mode including auto. The only real
guarantee in this file. Claude must never edit its own gates or rewrite its
ask   = always interrupts, even in auto mode. Golden tests and corpus expectations:
the one moment you DO want to be asked, because a test weakened to make code
pass is the failure you cannot catch by testing binaries.
allow = convenience only; pre-approves the Rust toolchain so sessions don't stall.
